PowerShell($r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001/scanner/runs/21/entries" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "total entries: $\($r.entries.Count\)"; $erev = $r.entries | Where-Object { $_.triggers | Where-Object { $_.detector -eq 'estimate_revision' -and $_.triggered } }; "EREV triggered: $\($erev.Count\) / $\($r.entries.Count\)")

PowerShell($r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001/scanner/runs/21/entries" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($e in $r.entries\) { $erev = $e.triggers | Where-Object { $_.detector -eq 'estimate_revision' }; if \($erev\) { $c = $erev.components; "{0,6} fired={1,-5} up7={2,3} down7={3,3} total={4,3} net={5,4} ratio={6:F2}" -f $e.ticker, $erev.triggered, [int]$c.up_7d, [int]$c.down_7d, [int]$c.total_7d, [int]$c.net_7d, $c.net_ratio } })
